description:
Kling Video-to-Audio.

Provide a video (3-20s) and optionally describe the audio you want.

video.description: Video to add audio to. 3-20 seconds duration. Formats: mp4, mov.
video.title: Video

sound_effect_prompt.description: Sound effect description. E.g. 'Ocean waves, seagulls, gentle wind'. Max 200 chars.
sound_effect_prompt.title: Sound Effect Prompt

bgm_prompt.description: Background music description. E.g. 'Upbeat electronic background music'. Max 200 chars.
bgm_prompt.title: Bgm Prompt

asmr_mode.description: Enable ASMR mode for enhanced detailed sound effects. Good for immersive content.
asmr_mode.title: Asmr Mode

title: AppInput
